metadata.name: single_token_liquidity
metadata.description: 1-token liquidity provisioning helper for Cubic Pool

instructions.name: deposit_single_token
docs: Single-token deposit: splits `amount_in` of one pool token into the
proportional basket, swaps the other legs via cubic-pool, deposits the
basket, mints BPT to the user, and refunds any dust.
- `amount_in`: raw amount of pool_tokens[token_in_index] the user sends
- `token_in_index`: index into pool.token_mints of the single token
- `slippage_hundredths_bps`: slippage bound applied to every per-leg
swap. Units: hundredths of a basis point, same scale as cubic-pool's
- `minimum_bpt_amount`: final safety guard on the BPT received.
See `DepositSingleToken` for the remaining_accounts layout.

errors.name: ZeroFeeAmount
errors.msg: Swap amount is too small: fee rounds to zero

errors.name: InvalidTokenProgram
errors.msg: Invalid token program passed in remaining_accounts

errors.name: InvalidVault
errors.msg: Invalid vault: must be ATA(pool, mint, token_program)

errors.name: InvalidHelperAta
errors.msg: Invalid helper ATA: must be ATA(helper_pda, mint, token_program)

errors.name: InvalidUserAta
errors.msg: User token account does not match expected owner/mint

errors.name: PoolNotSeeded
errors.msg: Pool not seeded: need at least one actual_balance > 0

errors.name: InvalidVirtualBalance
errors.msg: Virtual balance of zero for a token

errors.name: ZeroInputAllocation
errors.msg: Input token allocation is zero (input token W is zero)

errors.name: InvalidBptMint
errors.msg: Invalid BPT mint: must be [bpt_mint, pool] PDA in cubic-pool program

errors.name: InvalidPoolOwner
errors.msg: Pool account is owned by a different program

errors.name: PoolHasZeroBalanceToken
errors.msg: Pool has at least one token with actual_balance = 0; single-token deposit unsupported in this state

errors.name: AmountTooSmall
errors.msg: amount_in is too small: truncation would leave a pool token with zero allocation

errors.name: PendingProtocolFeesUnsupported
errors.msg: Single-token deposit cannot safely route the current protocol-fee state

types.name: CubicPool
docs: Cubic Pool account - implements virtual liquidity with weighted balances
## Layout notes:
- token_vaults REMOVED → derived as ATA(pool, mint, token_programs[i]) at runtime
- token_decimals REMOVED → read from mint accounts at runtime
- bpt_mint REMOVED → derived as PDA [BPT_MINT_SEED, pool.key()]
- bpt_total_supply REMOVED → read from bpt_mint.supply at runtime
- pool_id ADDED → allows multiple pools per config
- token_programs: per-token program IDs (SPL Token or Token-2022, can be mixed)

fields.name: config
docs: Reference to the config account

fields.name: bump
docs: Pool bump seed

fields.name: token_count
docs: Number of tokens in the pool (2-10)

fields.name: pool_id
docs: Pool identifier / salt — allows multiple pools per config.
PDA seeds: [CUBIC_POOL_SEED, config.key(), &pool_id.to_le_bytes()]

fields.name: token_mints
docs: Token mints (up to 10)

fields.name: token_programs
docs: Token programs per token (SPL Token or Token-2022, can be mixed)

fields.name: normalized_weights
docs: Normalized weights in basis points (sum to WEIGHT_SCALE = 10000 = 100%)

fields.name: virtual_balances
docs: Virtual balances for each token (in native token units)

fields.name: actual_balances
docs: Actual balances for each token

fields.name: swap_fee_rate
docs: Swap fee rate in hundredths of a basis point (0 to 10000 = 1%)

fields.name: protocol_fee_rate
docs: Protocol fee rate in basis points (0 to 5000 = 50% of swap fee)

fields.name: protocol_fees_owed
docs: Protocol fees owed for each token (in native token decimals)

fields.name: created_at
docs: Pool creation timestamp

fields.name: pool_enabled
docs: Pool enabled flag

fields.name: swaps_enabled
docs: Swaps enabled flag

fields.name: reserved
docs: Reserved for future extensions
